title: Add the calendar year in the shareable link
excerpt: When using the shareable link option for external clients, the date section does not show the year. For example in my editable table in Monday.com the dates shows 19 Aug, 2024. When I use the shareable link, it only prov…

posts.author: patricia.cribb-lanke (Trish)
posts.cookedHtml: When using the shareable link option for external clients, the date section does not show the year. For example in my editable table in Monday.com the dates shows 19 Aug, 2024. When I use the shareable link, it only provides 19 Aug. The year feature is important as we roll over to 2025.
